content:
# Micromodel

**Summary**: A Hele-Shaw cell is a simplified 2D flow model used to study fluid dynamics and interface stability in porous media.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[1998-khan|Khan, 1998]] used micromodel (Hele-Shaw) to simulate multiphase flow behavior under different drive mechanisms.

## Key Results and Findings

- The model successfully simulated the impact of production rates on water and gas cone formation at various well locations. ([[1998-khan|Khan, 1998, p. 53]])
